title: Capital Status and Kakori Conspiracy
focus: Traces the move of the provincial seat from Allahabad to Lucknow and the details of the Kakori trial held in the city.
rationale: Fallback section derived from packet-level grouping.
sectionExcerpt:
[Page 061]
Capital Status Confirmed
1920: Provincial Seat Moves
In 1920, the provincial seat of government moved from Allahabad to Lucknow, cementing the city's administrative importance.
Upon Indian independence in 1947, the United Provinces were reorganised into the state of Uttar Pradesh, and Lucknow remained its capital.

[Page 062]
KAKORI SENTENCE
KAKORI TRIAL CASE - RING THEATRE in Lucknow
Death sentence - Ram Prasad Bismil, Ashfaq Ullah Khan, Rajendra Nath Lahiri, Roshan Singh
